zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Scriven於1477年出生在英國史洛普爾福洛德斯利時，他的父親Robert Scriven60歲，母親Elizabetha Alicia Corbet47歲。他於1504年與Eleanor Blount在英國英格蘭史洛普爾金萊特結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1533年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾福洛德斯利享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Scriven
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name for a professional scribe, copyist, or clerk, from Middle English scrivein ‘scribe’ (Old French escrivain, medieval Latin scribanus). Compare Scrivener .
habitational name from Scriven (Yorkshire), from Old English scræfen, screfen ‘hollow place, place with caves or pits’.

variants.name: Scrivener
meanings: English: occupational name for a professional scribe, copyist, or clerk, from Middle English scrivener ‘scribe’ (a derivative of scrivain). Compare Scriven .

variants.name: Skirvin
meanings: Scottish: possibly a variant of Scriven , with metathesis of -ri- to -ir-. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Scrivens
meanings: English: variant of Scriven , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Scriven was born in 1477, in Frodesley, Shropshire, England, his father, Robert Scriven, was 60 and his mother, Elizabetha Alicia Corbet, was 47. He married Eleanor Blount in 1504, in Kinlet, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1533, in Frodesley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

Il a épousé Eleanor Blount en 1504, à Kinlet, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1533, à Frodesley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Scriven(이)가 1477년 영국 슈럽실르 프로데슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Scriven(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabetha Alicia Corbet(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 킨렛에서 Eleanor Blount(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1533년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 프로데슬리에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Scriven родился в 1477 г. в местности фродесли, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Scriven было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabetha Alicia Corbet, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Blount в 1504 г. в местности кинлет, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1533 г. в местности фродесли, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.
